# Prompt: AIDLC PR Body

Render the PR description for a completed AIDLC pipeline run. Plain Markdown, no emoji.

## Inputs

```
{{ticketKey}}      — e.g. PROJ-1234
{{ticketTitle}}
{{ticketUrl}}
{{microservice}}
{{architecture}}   — output from architect agent
{{codegen}}        — output from code-generator agent
{{tests}}          — output from test-generator agent
{{sonar}}          — output from sonar-reviewer agent
{{nexus}}          — output from nexus-scanner agent
{{review}}         — output from code-reviewer agent
{{runId}}
```

## Template

```markdown
# AIDLC: {{ticketKey}} — {{ticketTitle}}

> Auto-generated by the AIDLC pipeline. Run ID: `{{runId}}`

**Jira:** [{{ticketKey}}]({{ticketUrl}})
**Microservice:** `{{microservice}}`
**Architecture:** {{architecture.pattern}} / Spring Boot {{architecture.springBootVersion}} / Java {{architecture.javaVersion}}

---

## Code Generation

- Files generated: **{{codegen.filesGenerated}}**
- Architecture pattern: `{{architecture.pattern}}`
- Compilation: `{{codegen.compilationStatus}}`

## Tests

- Tests generated: **{{tests.testsGenerated}}**
- Passed: **{{tests.testsPassed}} / {{tests.testsGenerated}}**
- Line coverage: **{{tests.actualCoverage}}%** (target {{tests.targetCoverage}}%)
- Iterations to reach target: {{tests.iterations}}

## SonarQube

- Quality gate: **{{sonar.qualityGate}}**
- BLOCKER: {{sonar.counts.blockers}} | CRITICAL: {{sonar.counts.criticals}} | MAJOR: {{sonar.counts.majors}} | MINOR: {{sonar.counts.minors}}
- Coverage (Sonar): {{sonar.coverage}}%
- Duplications: {{sonar.duplications}}%

## Nexus IQ

- Critical CVEs: **{{nexus.counts.critical}}** | High: {{nexus.counts.high}} | Medium: {{nexus.counts.medium}} | Low: {{nexus.counts.low}}
- Policy violations: {{nexus.policyViolations}}
- Report: [Nexus IQ]({{nexus.reportUrl}})

## Code Review

- Overall score: **{{review.score}} / 100**
- Findings: critical=0, high={{review.findings.highCount}}, medium={{review.findings.mediumCount}}
- Summary: {{review.summary}}

---

## Acceptance Criteria

{{#each acceptanceCriteria}}
- [x] {{this}}
{{/each}}

## Reviewers

Auto-assigned via CODEOWNERS.

---

<sub>Generated by AIDLC. See `.github/README.md` for pipeline details.</sub>
```
